problem id: f1c1ed58
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11100011 -> 10011110
  10111100 -> 01010111
  00001100 -> 11001001
  00101011 -> 11000111
  01101111 -> 11111101
  11111001 -> 11111111
  10100001 -> 10111111
  00111111 -> 10011111
  00010001 -> 00110011

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 01111111
